faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Murray Hill typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your apartment or home, and the number of treatments required. Initial inspections help us provide accurate pricing, and we offer customized treatment plans for Murray Hill's diverse residential properties, from studio apartments to multi-bedroom co-ops.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Murray Hill apartment?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moths include small holes in wool, cashmere, or silk clothing, webbing in closet corners, silken tubes in fabric folds, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying near closets or windows. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillars) on clothing or damage to upholstered furniture, area rugs, or other natural fiber items in your Murray Hill home.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my Murray Hill apartment?
faqs.answer: Yes, our clothes moth treatments are completely safe for residential use in Murray Hill apartments and co-ops. We use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that target moths while minimizing exposure to people and pets. Our technicians take extra care in closets, bedrooms, and living spaces to ensure treatments are effective yet safe for your household.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning to my Murray Hill home?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regularly cleaning woolens and natural fiber clothing before storage, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets in closets, vacuuming closets and storage areas frequently, and storing off-season clothing in sealed containers. Our Murray Hill technicians provide detailed prevention tips during service and can set up monitoring traps to detect any future moth activity before it becomes a major problem.
